title: VTQ information hub 2024 to 2025: key dates and deadlines
body: "Ofqual has worked with awarding organisations to compile the following information on key dates and deadlines for vocational and technical qualifications (VTQ) in 2025.    This VTQ Information Hub is most relevant to school and college staff working in the administration or delivery of Level 3, Level 1/2 and Level 2 vocational and technical qualifications used for progression. It will help you prepare for the awarding organisation key dates and deadlines ahead of awarding in summer 2025.    There are deadlines that awarding organisations need centres to meet to ensure the timely delivery of results in August. It is important that centres ensure internal activities take place early enough to ensure the awarding organisation deadlines are met.   Information is arranged by awarding organisation and then by qualification. You can download csv files of the combined data for all awarding organisations, or for each individual organisation. In addition, each awarding organisation has provided a link to a webpage with information about their qualifications and key dates.   We are interested in your feedback about the VTQ Information Hub. If you have any comments about the usefulness of the hub or if there is information that you would like to see included, please email this address:  VTQInformationHub@ofqual.gov.uk   The VTQ Information Hub will be updated periodically to reflect changes made from awarding organisations regarding key dates.   Download key dates for all awarding organisations               Key dates for all awarding organisations    CSV, 2.52 MB  View online         Active IQ  Key dates and deadlines for qualifications from Active IQ. For more details see Active IQ’s delivery of results information page.   Download key dates for Active IQ               Key dates for Active IQ    CSV, 28 KB  View online       Fitness Vocationally Related Qualifications (VRQs)     End Date Event     30 April 2025 Term time checkpoint 1   20 June 2025 Qualification claim date   20 June 2025 Latest date for internal assessments to be completed   20 June 2025 Latest date for external assessments to be completed   4 July 2025 Deadline for submission of evidence for quality assurance   25 July 2025 Latest date by which external quality assurance must be completed   8 August 2025 Latest date by which certificates will be released to centres     Back to contents  Performance Table Qualifications (PTQs)     End Date Event     30 April 2025 Term time checkpoint 1   20 June 2025 Qualification claim date   20 June 2025 Latest date for internal assessments to be completed   20 June 2025 Latest date for external assessments to be completed   4 July 2025 Deadline for submission of evidence for quality assurance   25 July 2025 Latest date by which external quality assurance must be completed   8 August 2025 Latest date by which certificates will be released to centres     Back to contents    AIM  Key dates and deadlines for qualifications from AIM. For more details see AIM’s qualifications information page.   Download key dates for AIM               Key dates for AIM    CSV, 14.9 KB  View online       Cyber security     End Date Event     22 December 2024 Senior designated contact nomination   28 March 2025 Checkpoint One - Term time Checkpoint   31 May 2025 EQA monitoring for Cyber Security...
